note: Serpentine Galleries, London. Hand-maintained capture fixture. Refresh each season from serpentinegalleries.org/whats-on/. Future-opening only.

items.title: Amar Kanwar
items.description: Site-specific installation of new and existing films by the New Delhi-based artist — a meditative visual and sonic environment on decolonisation, Partition, displacement, nationalism, violence, censorship, and memory. Free
